holes.content: The asymmetrically textured silicon wafer (small front pyramids, large rear pyramids) preserves minority carrier lifetime of 3.4 ms (comparable to 3.2 ms for standard double-sided texture) and improves infrared EQE response compared with double-sided mild texture
holes.label: asymmetric_texture_benefit

holes.content: EDAI molecules chemically passivate uncoordinated Pb2+ surface defects by forming coordinate bonds, eliminating metallic Pb(0) peaks observed in XPS, while LiF alone does not provide this chemical passivation
holes.label: edai_chemical_passivation

holes.content: The LiF and EDAI layers are intertwined at the nanoscale: the discontinuous LiF layer allows EDAI to locally contact the perovskite surface, creating nanoscale localized contacts that balance electron tunnelling (through LiF) with direct transport (through EDAI/C60)
holes.label: intertwined_structure

holes.content: The bilayer passivation improves average Voc from below 1.90 V (unpassivated) to 1.96 V (LiF/EDAI), and FF from 76.2% to 80.8% for single-junction perovskite devices
holes.label: voc_progression
